title: How do I create an automation to delete all items in a group (but keep the group) every Sunday morning?
excerpt: I have a group called “Done!” on a board and items get moved there when their status changes to Done. How do I then create an automation that every Sunday morning, we delete/archive all of the items in that “Done!” group…

posts.author: ChrisFNaples (Chris Farrugia)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a group called “Done!” on a board and items get moved there when their status changes to Done. How do I then create an automation that every Sunday morning, we delete/archive all of the items in that “Done!” group?

posts.author: Kalyani (Kalyani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Chris,

We had a similar situation where we are using the below automation:

Screenshot 2023-07-10 at 12.08.25 PM2092×920 45.2 KB

We have an additional date column which is set to today when the item is moved to the Done group. And every 7 days the items of that group gets archived. I hope this will give you a workaround for your case.

Best,
Kalyani
